blocks.title: Capital Pathways
blocks.description: Powered by Moonshine Capital. Includes business funding, real estate funding, personal funding, credit stacking, lender directory, acquisition capital, and prequalification flows.

items.title: Business Funding
items.description: Working capital, term loans, lines of credit, revenue-based funding, and alternative capital for operating companies.

items.title: Real Estate Funding
items.description: Capital pathways for investors, builders, landlords, flippers, and real estate operators.

items.title: Personal Funding
items.description: Personal loans, credit-based funding, and consumer capital pathways where appropriate.

items.title: Credit Stacking
items.description: Structured access to cards, lines, and credit-based funding pathways.

items.title: Lender Directory
items.description: A curated directory of funding partners, lender programs, and referral options.

items.title: Prequal Quiz
items.description: An interactive route-finder that helps visitors find the right funding or partner pathway.

items.title: Acquisition Capital
items.description: Private application-based capital strategy for buyers pursuing SME acquisitions.

blocks.title: Operator Brief
blocks.description: This section should educate, route, and qualify visitors before pushing them into the right capital pathway.
bullets: Use localStorage during beta to remember quiz/pathway choices.
Add /api/lead submission when the data layer goes live.

blocks.title: Request Capital Access
blocks.description: Tell us what you need from the Capital stack and we will route you accordingly.
